Traditional crypto: Lost wallet = Lost forever VFide: Lost wallet \u2192 Search vault \u2192 Verify identity \u2192 Recover  Search Methods: 1. Recovery ID (hashed email/phone/username) - User remembers their identifier 2. Badge fingerprint - Match unique badge combination 3. Guardian lookup - Guardian can help locate vault 4.
